title: Fleet, London, then Continent: France & Switzerland

excursions.label: Day trip to London (Harrods, Berkeley Hotel, Harvey Nichols)

stops.excerpt: We stopped off to see Eversley Church where we were married nearly 48 years ago.
Then on to Hounslow West, underground station, to park van.
We trained into London on the Piccadilly line + bought chocolates at Harrods.
On to the Berkeley Hotel + met Bobby + Steve in the lobby.
Then back to Harvey Nichols where we had a good lunch with Peter + Nana outside.

summary: Simon and Eve left Birmingham on 15 June 2022, kennelling the dog (Tinder) and stopping overnight at Little Bramshott Farm campsite near Fleet, Hampshire. The following day they made a day trip into London (Harrods, Berkeley Hotel, Harvey Nichols) before heading to the Continent via an unrecorded Channel crossing; the French, Swiss and possibly Italian legs of the trip are not covered by the transcribed pages in this bundle.
extraction_notes: Only one spread (B_0365, left page only has text) was available. The diary text cuts off mid-sentence ('set off thru') at the point of departure for the Continent. The title_guess references France, Switzerland and Italy (Pavia, Pian del Voglio) but none of those legs appear in the transcribed evidence. The continental route has been represented with low-confidence inferred_anchor stubs for France and Switzerland only; Italy has been flagged as unresolved because it does not appear in the trip_id slug and may belong to an adjacent trip. The crossing is inferred as dover-calais (default England-France) since no port is named; Portsmouth would also have been geographically plausible from Fleet. The date year is confirmed as 2022 (June 15 fell on a Wednesday in 2022, matching the diary). Travellers listed as Simon and Eve only based on diary voice ('we'), but other family members may have joined on the continental leg.
